title: ISic000652. I.Sicily inscription 000652
body:
Text encoding: Jonathan Prag; edition source: https://www.zotero.org/groups/382445/items/4MCP2PVV
1[---] π̣αῖδες θλίβουσιν̣ ε̣σ̣[---]
2[---] καὶ νούσοις ἤπια φάρμακα πᾶσσι̣ν̣
3[---]δαίμων τοῦ μὲν κλέος οὔποτ’ ὀλῖται
4[---]ε δύσις μεγάλων μεμνήσεται ἔργων

Text encoding: Jonathan Prag; edition source: https://www.zotero.org/groups/382445/items/4MCP2PVV
1[---].ΑΙΔΕΣΘΛΙΒΟΥΣΙ...[---]
2[---]ΚΑΙΝΟΥΣΟΙΣΗΠΙΑΦΑΡΜΑΚΑΠΑΣΣ..
3[---]ΔΑΙΜΩΝΤΟΥΜΕΝΚΛΕΟΣΟΥΠΟΤΟΛΙΤΑΙ
4[---]ΕΔΥΣΙΣΜΕΓΑΛΩΝΜΕΜΝΗΣΕΤΑΙΕΡΓΩΝ

Facsimile Images

Apparatus criticus

  • Text of Guarducci

translation

commentary

Understood by Guarducci (ed.pr.) to be a verse epigram for a doctor, likely of the second century CE, of a type familiar in mainland Italy, and perhaps to be associated with a sanctuary of Aesclepias in the vicinity (a statue of Hygeia was found in the area also). Manganaro instead suggested an interpretation relating to the construction of a thermal spa / bath building, perhaps in the fourth century (strongly rejected by Robert). ISic000632 was found in close proximity.

bibliography

  • 44.0738.14 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000796
  • 38.0968 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000796
  • 1967.0707 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001282
  • 1950.0241a https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001282
  • Guarducci NSA 1940 225-226 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001392
  • Cultrera NSA 1940 218 fig.26 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001392
  • Manganaro 1965 208 no.8 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001841
  • Manganaro 1988 63 n.322 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001427
  • Manganaro 1994 99 no.14 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001825
  • Manganaro 2010 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001793

Large, regular letters of generally fairly broad module, but with some irregularlity in the width of the module. Lunate epsilon and sigma, uncial omega. Large round omicron. narrow alpha with broken bar.

Line 1 50-55 Line 2 53-70 Line 3 45-55 Line 4 50-55 Interlineation line 1 to 2
